title: SecurityAuditSkill
description: Static security analysis on migration payloads, configurations, and SOQL queries (v2.0.0)

GateDecision.description: Pipeline gate decision. BLOCK when risk_score > 0.7 or any CRITICAL finding.

location.description: Field path, file path, or query index where the issue was detected

description.description: Human-readable description of the security issue

recommendation.description: Specific remediation action to resolve this finding

evidence_snippet.description: Redacted/masked evidence — NEVER contains raw secrets or PII

job_id.description: Migration job identifier echoed from input

passed.description: True when risk_score <= 0.7 AND no CRITICAL findings

findings.description: All security findings from deterministic checks

risk_score.description: Composite risk score. > 0.7 blocks the pipeline. Any CRITICAL finding forces minimum 0.71.

llm_analysis.description: Optional LLM-generated security analysis narrative. Null when request_llm_analysis=false.

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the audit was performed

title: SecurityAuditSkill Envelope

payload.description: Migration payload or configuration dict to audit for PII, secrets, and injection risks

file_paths.description: File paths to check against whitelist (/var/data/migration/ and /tmp/migration-work/ only)

soql_queries.description: SOQL query strings to validate for injection risks

has_sox_scope.description: Whether this migration is under SOX compliance scope

request_llm_analysis.description: When true, invoke claude-sonnet-4-6 for analytical commentary on findings

output.title: SecurityAuditOutput
output.description: Security audit result returned by the security agent

blocking_rules.description: Pipeline is BLOCKED when any of these conditions are true

risk_score_calculation.description: Risk score weights per severity level (summed, capped at 1.0)
risk_score_calculation.note: Any CRITICAL finding sets a minimum risk_score of 0.71

deterministic_checks.name: soql_injection
deterministic_checks.description: SELECT-only; no semicolons, UNION, or DML keywords

deterministic_checks.name: entropy_check
deterministic_checks.description: Shannon entropy > 4.5 for strings of length >= 16 flags potential secrets
deterministic_checks.severity: CRITICAL (with secret key name hint) or HIGH (without)

deterministic_checks.name: pii_detection
deterministic_checks.description: Email (RFC 5322), SSN (US), and credit card patterns detected in payload values

soql_queries: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE IsActive = true

findings.description: Raw email address detected at 'root.field_mappings.email_field'. Found 1 instance(s). PII must never be present in migration configuration payloads.
findings.recommendation: Remove all email address values from this payload. Use tokenized/pseudonymized references instead.

soql_queries: SELECT Id, Name, Phone FROM Account LIMIT 1000
